subject: History
chapter: Kings and Chronicles: The Mughal Courts

remember: Students will be able to recall the names of the Mughal emperors, their succession, and the chronology of the Mughal Empire.
Students will be able to describe the major events and milestones of the Mughal Empire.
Students will be able to identify the key features of the Mughal administrative system, including the structure of the government and the role of the nobility.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of the 'Mughal Empire' and its significance in Indian history.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of the Mughal Empire on Indian society, culture, and politics.
Students will be able to understand the role of the Mughal emperors in shaping the artistic, literary, and architectural heritage of India.
apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of the Mughal Empire to understand the historical context of contemporary Indian society and politics.
Students will be able to use the concepts of the Mughal Empire to analyze and interpret primary sources, such as chronicles and other historical documents.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the strengths and weaknesses of the Mughal Empire, including its administrative, economic, and military systems.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of the Mughal Empire on the social, cultural, and economic development of India.

ncert_objectives: To understand the concept of the Mughal Empire and its significance in Indian history.
To describe the major events and milestones of the Mughal Empire, including the reign of Akbar, Jahangir, Shah Jahan, and Aurangzeb.
To analyze the impact of the Mughal Empire on Indian society, culture, and politics.
board_exam_objectives: To describe the major features of the Mughal administrative system, including the structure of the government and the role of the nobility.
To explain the significance of the Mughal Empire in the context of Indian history and its impact on contemporary Indian society and politics.
To analyze the strengths and weaknesses of the Mughal Empire, including its administrative, economic, and military systems.
